title: Kimetsu No Yaiba X Epic Fight X Weapons of Miracles
description: A Epic Fight Compatibility Mod for Kimetsu No Yaiba Mod with Weapons of Miracles Animations
body:
# A Epic Fight mod compatibility for Kimetsu No Yaiba Mod with Weapons of Miracles animations for Minecraft 1.20.1.

Play as Demon Slayer to hunt and kill Demons or become a Demon and conquer the sunlight or just watch them fight.

Its my first uploaded mod and i will add more animations for each weapons, combat style and maybe custom animations.

Features:
- most Demon and Demon Slayer have their own combo.
- most weapon have their own combo but most of them are the same combo for now.
- custom moveset for players who want to play akaza (Basically just a fist style with custom combo) theres a akaza moveset item on Combat Tab on creative the menu.
- custom trails!!!!!

I made this mainly for myself and Im having fun making it and playin with it and maybe theres people like me whose seaching for updated mod like this. 

8/14/2025 Update for Users
- Sorry but due to lack of updates on kimetsu No yaiba and Weapons of miracles I might have to discontinue this mod and maybe make a new one using [Epic Fight Ressurection](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epicfight-resurrection) instead for 1.20.1 or even 1.16.5 if they have one ofc. I will update some trails to a lower pixle ones to match the minecraft theme and maybe add the current as legacy trails but it will take some time cause this is just a hobby of mine, just to pass time and to learn javascript so Thank you for all of your support!.

Dependencies:
- [Weapons of Miracles v20.1.8.5.6](https://modrinth.com/mod/weapons-of-miracles/version/20.1.8.5.6)
- [Epic Fight v20.9.7](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight/version/20.9.7)
- [Kimetsu No Yaiba v1.3 for forge mc 1.20.1](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/demonslayer/files/6058779)
